content.text:
I have enough to answer precisely. Lines 70 and 202 are both pattern-match arms reading existing events — not constructors. Only lines 273 (`agent_loop.rs`) and 92 (`tool_enforcement.rs`) construct the struct literal.

## A. PolicyDenial constructors
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/agent_loop.rs:273`: the loop's own policy check — constructs and immediately emits the event when a tool is denied at loop time
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs:92`: `EnforcedAuditSink::emit` — synthesizes a `PolicyDenial` for `ToolCallRequested` events where the tool is not in the allowlist, catching calls that bypassed the loop's own check

## B. AuditSink implementors
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs:120`: `NullSink`
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs:151`: `InMemorySink`
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs:209`: `JsonlFileSink`
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs:55`: `EnforcedAuditSink`
